mapper.select: SELECT id, spec_eqp_tower_code, spec_eqp_tower_name, spec_eqp_tower_area, spec_eqp_tower_model, spec_eqp_tower_type, spec_eqp_tower_material, spec_eqp_tower_height, spec_eqp_tower_diameter, spec_eqp_tower_layer, spec_eqp_tower_design_pressure, spec_eqp_tower_design_temp, spec_eqp_tower_media, spec_eqp_tower_media_property, spec_eqp_tower_manufacturer, spec_eqp_tower_factory_no, spec_eqp_tower_produce_date, spec_eqp_tower_install_company, spec_eqp_tower_install_date, spec_eqp_tower_acceptance_date, spec_eqp_tower_usage_date, spec_eqp_tower_license_no, spec_eqp_tower_status, spec_eqp_tower_last_inspect_date, spec_eqp_tower_next_inspect_date, spec_eqp_tower_inspect_company, spec_eqp_tower_maintain_responsible, spec_eqp_tower_maintain_record, spec_eqp_tower_accident_record, spec_eqp_tower_create_time, spec_eqp_tower_update_time, spec_eqp_tower_factory, spec_eqp_tower_backup1, spec_eqp_tower_backup2, spec_eqp_tower_backup3 FROM spec_eqp_tower_account
